visual_description: A man in dark clothing stands beside a parked car at night while another person is visible inside the vehicle. He steps away from the car, turns toward the camera with an intense, focused expression, and the scene briefly shows a dark body of water with a faintly lit boat. The clip ends with a close‑up of the man in a suit looking forward seriously.
